description: Reasoning toolkit of 48 skills — decomposition, questioning, assumption excavation, perspective shifts, decision analysis, ideation, synthesis, and epistemic integrity checks. Invoke one explicitly by name, or let Codex match one by description.

interface.longDescription: Forty-eight small reasoning skills that each do one thing: break a problem at its joints, surface what you are assuming, argue the opposite, tile the futures a decision hinges on, check whether the evidence carries the claim. Each skill is prose instructions only — no network calls, no credentials, no background state.
interface.shortDescription: Forty-eight reasoning skills for thinking through hard problems.

name: thinkies
